heroHeadline: Zelenskyy Renews Easter Truce Offer as Russia Continues Aerial Bombardment
heroSubtitle: Ukraine reiterates ceasefire proposal ahead of Orthodox Easter, framing Kyiv as the willing partner for peace while Russian strikes on Ukrainian cities persist
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
